care.summary: Cheerful round-leaf houseplant that likes bright indirect light and even moisture; easy to share via pups.
care.light: Bright indirect; avoid harsh midday sun that scorches leaves
care.water: When top 2–3 cm of soil dries; keep evenly moist, not soggy
care.humidity: Medium; likes occasional misting in dry rooms
care.fertilizer: Balanced liquid feed monthly in spring/summer
tips: Rotate pot weekly for even growth
Separate pups when they have roots
Use a pot with drainage holes
